title: Cenovus Energy Q4 Earnings Skyrocket on Record Production
summary: Cenovus Energy on Thursday reported a surge in fourth-quarter net earnings from a year earlier as its upstream production rose by 5% on the year to hit a record high. Cenovus Energy’s net earnings jumped to US$683 million (C$934 million) for the fourth quarter, up from US$107 million (C$146 million…

title: Centrica Halts £800 Million Buyback to Fund Major Infrastructure Investments
summary: London-listed energy giant Centrica shares plunged nine per cent on Thursday morning after the group paused its share buyback programme in the face of a major earnings hit. title: Oil Demand Slumped by 614,000 Bpd in December on U.S. Decline
summary: Global oil demand fell by 614,000 barrels per day (bpd) in December compared to November 2025, and plunged by 536,000 bpd from December 2024, driven by lower U.S. demand, the monthly report by the Joint Organizations Data Initiative (JODI) showed on Thursday. At the same time, oil production surged…

title: Trump Admin Threatens To Withdraw From IEA Over Net Zero Agenda
summary: U.S. Energy Secretary Chris Wright has issued a one-year deadline for the International Energy Agency (IEA) to abandon its net-zero emissions agenda or risk the United States withdrawing from the organization. title: Turkey Opposes Greece-Chevron Exploration Deal Offshore Crete

title: India Considers Boosting Imports of U.S. Oil and Coal
summary: India should increase the amount of crude oil and coking coal it imports from the United States as a way to diversify its supply under the interim trade deal between New Delhi and Washington, according to the country’s commerce and industry minister.
